name: FinProof v1
description: FinProof is the complete BFSI adversarial safety benchmark — ASSAY v1 (classical generation, 4,200 prompts) merged with ASSAY-QI v2.0 (quantum-augmented generation, 1,273 prompts). 5,473 adversarial prompts across 7 BFSI attack categories, 3 difficulty levels, and 3 registers (professional, customer_mobile, rm_internal). First benchmark to combine quantum circuit Born machine sampling, simulated annealing QUBO perturbation, and retail register adversarial generation for BFSI AI safety evaluation.

assay_qi_v2.description: Quantum-augmented: QCBM 8q/10q + SA annealing + retail register

assay_v1.description: ASSAY v1 — Claude/GPT-4o generated, 7 categories × 3 difficulties × 200 prompts

assay_qi_v2.overlap_note: 84 prompts (qcbm_source=pg_miss_v1_professional) already present in ASSAY v1 → excluded to avoid double-counting in FinProof
assay_qi_v2.description: ASSAY-QI v2.0 — quantum-augmented + retail register. See assay_qi_final_v2.jsonl for standalone 1,273-prompt corpus.

note_on_counts: FinProof v1 = ASSAY v1 (4,200) + ASSAY-QI v2.0 non-overlapping (1,189) = 5,389. ASSAY-QI v2.0 as a standalone benchmark contains 1,273 prompts (84 overlap with ASSAY v1).
